title: Simple Dragons
description: This mod adds dragons to minecraft. For now there is only one kind: Eastern Eldwyrm. Eldwyrms are cute, multicolored and quite useful.
body:
# Simple Dragons

![Different dragon colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47545c2cf2b3d106f58bc60c1a71a0cbc603507d_0.webp)

This mod adds **dragons** to minecraft. They're not big and scary, but rather **cute and helpful**. 

## Eastern Eldwyrm

For now there is only one type of dragon — Eastern Eldwyrm. I used **Asian dragons** with deer horns and beards as a basis. You can paint them in any color and put your things in saddlebags. 

But first things first. You need to find **Eastern Temple**, which is located in **cherry grove**. 

![Eastern Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebb7fd7902a890f2cea5d5c676be6556d1921ab8_0.webp)

There will be a chest, where you can find 3 new items:

* **Scaly Egg**;
* **Katana**;
* **Dragon saddle**.

![Loot in temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f997d1d96b00a7dd930fe29d12ec83563b97eba8.png)

You can also craft Katana and Dragon saddle:

![Crafts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95825a5ec31af1484001afa03a97abdf204b3666.png)

Now you need to place this egg anywhere on the ground.

![Dragon egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bd7c3c1c34ba95f44b265b464b4be336c0e62d1_0.webp)

After 10-20 min a little dragon (with a custom model!) will hatch:

![Hatchling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8830c6a1e2c05f094e92956dea701b30dbe4bd5e_0.webp)

Then you need to wait for one day, and the dragon will grow up. You can tame and breed adult dragons using **Cactus flowers**.

![Adult dragons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f5a4ccf73273cb0b18d9e0329a26be7199d3026.png)

Then you can equip a saddle on a dragon an put something into its inventory. You need to shift+rightclick on a saddled dragon with empty hand to open gui:

![Dragon inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e16158d388e269b1198effd168090b429ef159af_0.webp)

You can **use katana to sit your dragon down** or make him stand up:

![Sitting dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad89047b44f481ae1606908d2d881c9b01071802_0.webp)

By the way, kata has its own custom model. Its slightly stronger than iron sword but has greater attack speed.

![Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3199f17cb3d7f1013fd432cd2e2c6f2d5cb2b6e_0.webp)

To dye your dragon, **just rightclick on it with any dye**. When the dragon is customized and his saddlebag is filled with your equipment, you can just fly away:

* to fly up, **hold space up to 3 sec** (the longer you hold, the higher will the dragon fly);
* when flying, you can **press space up to 5 more times** to speed up. The dragon will fly in the direction of your gaze, but after a few seconds it will get tired and begin to descend. At this point, press the space bar again or, if you have already used acceleration 5 times, go down to the ground to rest and take off again.

![Flying away](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dba93d1504fe80618248d885cb038c1157bde741_0.webp)

## Lighting Dragon

It's another variation of Eldwyrm. Firstly, you need to find Weather Pearls in Eastern Temple and craft Weather Orb.

![Orb Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c7b697fb59879297f4730bad53a999c11102387.png)

By the way, you can shoot Weather Pearls - they spawn lightnings when hit the ground! You can also use Weather Orb to change the weather:

![Weather Orb GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6f0569128ee7944600549e17e8f566d7ee8b1cb_0.webp)

Then you need to rightclick on your dragon with the orb:

![Lightning dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03250403977bfcabaf05e03f5f87efedf58479e1.png)

This dragon cannot be dyed. It can strike lightnings when you press J while riding it. 

![Lightning strike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b360cb237884f786af284d027fa5666ea634d24_0.webp)

That's all for now. I hope you'll enjoy the mod.

There will be more dragon species in the nearest future!
